articles.title: Set up SSO for your workspace
body: Learn how to configure SAML SSO for your Northstar Cloud workspace.
Admins can connect Okta, Azure AD, or Google Workspace to centralize sign-in and enforce login policy.
To get started, open Security settings, copy your ACS URL, and upload the IdP metadata file.

articles.title: Understand proration on plan changes
body: Northstar Cloud prorates upgrades and downgrades using the remaining time in your billing cycle.
When you move from Growth to Enterprise, the unused portion of your old plan is credited automatically.
Your next invoice shows the credit, the new charge, and the updated renewal total.

articles.title: Export product usage for board reporting
body: Use the usage export to pull workspace adoption, license utilization, and expansion signals into CSV format.
The export includes seat assignments, active users, workflow volume, and engagement windows.
Leaders often use the file for board packs and quarterly business reviews.

articles.title: Fix webhook signature errors
body: Webhook signature failures usually mean your endpoint secret is outdated or the request body was modified before verification.
Northstar Cloud signs each event using HMAC-SHA256 and sends the timestamp and signature in the X-Northstar-Signature header.
Verify the raw payload before parsing JSON and rotate secrets if you suspect exposure.
